categories.name: Self-Inquiry (Ātma-Vicāra)
categories.description: Methods and contemplations focusing on recognizing the true nature of the self as the witness.

categories.name: Dispassion (Vairāgya)
categories.description: Teachings focusing on turning away from transient phenomena.

categories.name: Liberation (Mukti)
categories.description: Expositions on the nature of ultimate freedom.
